name: Sea Power : Naval Combat in the Missile Age
short_description: From the lead designer of Cold Waters, Sea Power lets you control NATO and Warsaw Pact forces in modern naval conflict campaigns. Use your advanced naval weaponry and sensors to respect rules of engagement and defeat the enemy forces in a tense fight for initiative and air/naval supremacy.
detailed_description:
After hostilities have broken out in Central Europe, the race is on as a pressured US Navy escort force battle off Soviet bomber and submarine attacks on a perilous quest to reinforce NATO defenders in Europe. Meanwhile, in the Persian Gulf, the conflict between Iran and Iraq risks escalating into a larger confrontation between superpowers as both sides indiscriminately attack neutral merchant shipping. And in the Norwegian Sea, an outnumbered Soviet surface force challenges the might of a massive US Navy amphibious force bound for occupied Norway...

Brought to you by the lead designer of Cold Waters, Sea Power lets you control NATO and Warsaw Pact forces in a modern naval conflict. Whether it's gunning it out with Boghammars in a surface duel, fighting off aerial attackers armed with long-range missiles, or hunting for enemy submarines with aircraft and surface ships, advanced weaponry and sensors are at your disposal.

Can you successfully hide your forces while detecting and tracking theirs? It is up to you to play an advanced game of cat and mouse on the high seas, to seize the initiative and attack with the advantage of surprise on your side. And at all times, you have to observe rules of engagement and take care not to cause an unnecessary incident that could lead to escalation. After all, you cannot really be sure just who that radar contact at 30.000 feet is, can you?

Features List

  •  Gameplay focused on the Cold War era between the 1960s and 1980s

  •  Over 200 naval units, including original ships and submarines, and more than 100 aircraft

  •  Full-featured Mission Editor

  •  Global map available for Mission Editor; create scenarios in any region on Earth

  •  Rich variety of historical and fictional single scenarios, for all factions

  •  Linear Campaign (non Dynamic) with branching options and story events

  •  Dynamic Campaign - theater scale (beta version launching mid 2026)

  •  Pausable real-time controls with time compression options

  •  Dynamic time of day and weather per scenario

  •  Complete support for modding, including 3rd party asset loading

  •  Support for Steam Workshop, with over 4,000 submissions as of January 2026

  •  Custom soundtrack with unique tracks per faction

  •  Real-time combat

  •  Advanced flight and ship physics modeling

  •  Realistic aircraft carrier flight ops, with configurable simulation level

  •  Advanced sensor modeling for radar, sonar, electronic countermeasures, and visual identification

  •  Save and load games anytime and anywhere

  •  Detailed, accurate 3D graphics with meticulously researched ships, submarines, and aircraft

  •  Historically accurate squadron liveries, callsigns, and serial numbers for almost all aircraft

  •  Over 150 weapon systems and 100 unique ground objects, including vehicles, SAM sites, airbases, and buildings

  •  Dynamically generated real-world terrain

  •  Continuously improving AI utilizing real period-correct doctrine

Planned Early Access Roadmap

Below is our currently planned early access roadmap for Sea Power.

English*, German, Russian*, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
